title: tragacantha scleroxylon
intro: Tragacantha scleroxylon, also known as the African Milkwood, is a species of evergreen tree found in sub-Saharan Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its bark, leaves, and roots are rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and easing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Tragacantha scleroxylon tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
